title: Reference — provisioning targets + fabric reference corpus (fabric-os local override)
purpose: Provisioning copy targets (templates/) plus fabric-os's active reference corpus: ADRs, design refs, ESG, financial, security, operations refs, evaluation, guides, canon reference, and legacy holding for provenance. Local override of canon 07-reference: declares fabric's real reference child folders and the glossary index file.

allowlistNotes.adr|design|esg|financial|security|operat: fabric-os reference corpus domains — cross-referenced reference material.
allowlistNotes.legacy-layer-root|legacy-top-level: decomposed legacy docs kept for provenance.
